case_title: JOHN LESLIE SANFORD IV ET AL VS. HAROLD HOOGASIAN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENRY, ROBERT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2021 - JUDGMENT.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$158.00) (PROOF OF SERVICE FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) SERVED OCT-04-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HOOGASIAN, HAROLD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-29-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JOHN LESLIE SANFORD IV IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ROBERT HENRY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HAROLD HOOGASIAN IS PRESENT. THE COURT HEARS EVIDENCE THAT THE PLAINTIFF IS OUT OF THE COUNTRY FOR AN UNDETERMINED LENGTH OF TIME. HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG DISMISSES THE JOHN LESLIE SANFORD IV CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENRY, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOOGASIAN, HAROLD $1,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $233.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,133.00, PLAINTIFF SANFORD CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF HENRY IS CHARGED $500 FOR HARDWOOD FLOORS. BALANCE OF $1900 IS DUE TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY SANFORD IV, JOHN LESLIE HENRY, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT HOOGASIAN, HAROLD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-29-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-05-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HOOGASIAN, HAROLD
